ui.stdinPlaceholderWithSample: Example input from a test case will be placed here. Edit it and run again.
ui.stdinPlaceholder: Leave empty if the program does not use input().
ui.inputNoteBody: Type all input lines before running. Each line in the Standard input box will be read by one input() call in order.
ui.testCasesDesc: The system runs your code once per test case and sends each case's input through stdin.
ui.noTestCases: This exercise has no automatic test cases yet. Use manual input to run code.
